name: KUROI CHOCHO BAKUHATSU NO JUTSU (BLACK BUTTERFLY BOMBS)

description.value:
The user charges each Kuroi Chocho under his control with chakra, to the point that they violently explode upon death.

This technique empowers one or more Kuroi Chocho or Tajuu Kuroi Chocho such that in the event of their death, they explode in a great burst of shadowy needles. Each creature caught in the area of effect of a construct's explosion suffers 1d4 piercing (Up to 3d4) which can be halved with a successful Reflex save, as the Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu bursts into dozens of shadowy needles. The user is able to "charge" up to 1 Kuroi Chocho per 4 levels of the character.

A creature engaged in a grapple with a Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu sacrificed suffers a -4 penalty to its save. If the creature was pinned or otherwise unable to defend itself, the penalty is -8.

Requires: Kuroi Chocho Bunshin no Jutsu (3)

Effect: Destroys up to 1 Kuroi Chocho/2 level in explosions

Empower: The user may spend an additional 1 chakra to increase the damage of a single Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu by 1d4 wind, up to 3d4 additional wind damage per replicate.

Mastery: Each step of mastery allows the user to increase the potency and number of Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu.

The first step of mastery increases the damage of each Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu to 2d4 piercing, and allows the user to spend additional Chakra to empower additional Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu (up to 1/3 level).

The second step of mastery increases the damage of each Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu to 3d4 piercing.

The third step of mastery allows the user to spend additional Chakra to empower additional Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu (up to 1/2 level), as well as allowing the user to detonate each empowered Kuroi Chocho Bakuhatsu as part of this technique.

system.range: Long (30 ft. + 15 ft./2 levels) (30 ft. + 15 ft./2 levels)
